calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Justin Allanano, Esq. for Plaintiff: OTR, an Ohio General Partnership,
Plaintiff's witness: Linda Yang, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Baltes/Valentino California, Inc., an Arizona Corporation, as follows:
Damages $338,481.65
Attorney's Fees $6,003.50
Costs $450.50 for a total of $344,935.65
Judgment signed in open court.
